title: Beryl
description: Introducing an efficient shader pipeline for Vulkan.
body: Beryl is a new Vulkan based and optimized shader pipeline to enhance graphics with low performance impact. --- Developing this mod requires huge amounts of time and effort. If you want to help me continue developing this project, consider buying me a coffee. ## Installation ![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg) - **VulkanMod** is required to run this mod. - Add `beryl.jar` to `/mods` folder of your instance --- **What about shader packs?** Currently beryl has an integrated shader pack, as that allows to have full control over the rendering pipeline and to better optimize it.
